cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this problem. So, the question is asking between what times Andrew could have gone to the coffee shop. The coffee shop was closed after 8pm. Let's go through the information step by step. First, Andrew woke up at 8am. So he's awake starting at 8am. Then, Elizabeth saw Andrew fixing their computer at the electronic store from 11am to 3pm. So between 11 a.m. and 3 p.m., Andrew was at the electronic store. That means he couldn't have gone to the coffee shop during that time because he was at the electronic store.
